race.description: William Hill Each Way Extra Challenge Series Handicap Chase
race.comment: GOOD WORLD (13) has been off the track since an impressive 1.5L win at Fairyhouse in November. Great record when fresh though so no fitness concerns and rates as the one they all have to beat. HARBOUR HIGHWAY (1) is very interesting judging on 0.5L success at Leopardstown two starts ago. Found a better race than this too tough since but holds big winning claims back at the easier level. HITTHEHAYSON (3) is progressing with racing this campaign. Encountered one when 7L second at Down Royal. Could easily go one better here. DUFFYS HODEY (6) went clear winning by 11L at Limerick. Followed that with good 1L third at Wexford. Set to give another bold showing here.
